$comment: Placeholder Scoop manifest — populated by the release-package-managers workflow on the first v*.*.* tag. The version field carries 0.0.0-placeholder so 'scoop install' refuses gracefully until the real release lands.
description: Backend manufacturer — DSL → FastAPI + PostgreSQL generator. Awaiting first release.
notes: QiloBack has not been released to this bucket yet. Wait for the first v*.*.* tag on github.com/delixon-labs/qiloback-core, then 'scoop update && scoop install qiloback'.
